testcase.name: test_hardware_likely_touched

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False is True + where False = <function _check_hardware_touched at 0x0000021AA2659A80>(WindowsPath('C:/Users/khams008/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-khams008/pytest-122/test_hardware_likely_touched0'), 'hwfw')

testcase.failure:
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/khams008/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-khams008/pytest-122/test_hardware_likely_touched0')
def test_hardware_likely_touched(tmp_path): from awr2944_dca.mmws.failure_report import _check_hardware_touched
# 1. No run_id assert _check_hardware_touched(tmp_path, "") is False
# 2. run_id but no progress file assert _check_hardware_touched(tmp_path, "norun") == "unknown"
# 3. progress file exists but no hardware commands (tmp_path / "safefw_1_progress.jsonl").write_text(json.dumps({"command": "WriteToLog"})) assert _check_hardware_touched(tmp_path, "safefw") is False
# 4. progress file exists and has hardware commands lines = [ json.dumps({"command": "WriteToLog"}), json.dumps({"command": "PowerOn"}) ] (tmp_path / "hwfw_1_progress.jsonl").write_text("\n".join(lines)) > assert _check_hardware_touched(tmp_path, "hwfw") is True E AssertionError: assert False is True E + where False = <function _check_hardware_touched at 0x0000021AA2659A80>(WindowsPath('C:/Users/khams008/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-khams008/pytest-122/test_hardware_likely_touched0'), 'hwfw')
tests\test_failure_report.py:151: AssertionError
